raw_consumer_statement: I received a notice from an attorney as well as the sheriff today with a summons to court for a credit card I knew absolutely nothing about. It was from XXXX, since then I disputed 2 credit cards my ex husband took out in my name and charged over {$15000.00} and other cards he put me in debt from I went through the national debt relief program. I tried speaking with the credit card company, they couldnt help me, I tried calling the collections dept, they kept hanging up on me, so I just called the credit bureau and they recommended I filed a complaint that I was a victim of fraud.
